notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena hits a grand slam (9) to left field. Victor Robles scores. Colt Emerson scores. J.P. Crawford scores.

notableEvents.label: Weston Wilson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Weston Wilson flies out to right fielder Nathan Lukes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Colt Emerson to 3rd. Colt Emerson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
